interpretation: Fair/poor — revise coding guide and categories before submission

spec2_exclude_uncertain.description: Cases where NEITHER coder said UNCERTAIN (binary WATER vs NOT_WATER)

spec3_coder1_confident.description: Cases where coder1 gave a non-UNCERTAIN label

coder2_note: Real independent second-coder labels applied May 2026. Coder2 is the AI system acting as independent coder on all 91 decisions. Three-label kappa is lower than simulated (0.734) due to Brazil stratum: 19/20 Brazil cases coded WATER by coder2 vs UNCERTAIN by coder1. Binary kappa (0.932) is essentially identical to simulated result.
